name: mycelium-might
short_effect: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.
effect_text: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
flavor_text: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
